title: Selcaron
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Planet04-SWR.png]] |name=Selcaron |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |sector=[[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]] |system=[[Selaggis system/Legends|Selaggis system]]''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' |coordinates=N-6 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited=[[Selaggis VI]] |position= |moons= |routes=[[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant Run]] |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate=Favorable[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities=[[Unidentified colony (Selcaron)|Unidentified colony]] |imports= |exports= |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]{{SW|url=news/the-imperial-warlords-despoilers-of-an-empire-part-1|series=The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} *[[Zsinj's Empire]] }} {{Quote|Where do I know the name Selaggis from?''"
"''Another Zsinj strike zone. One of the first I looked at after I assumed command of this task force. One of the moons of Selaggis Six was colonized. I guess Zsinj decided to make a lesson of someone colonizing on his border without his permission. ''Iron Fist'' wiped out the whole colony. I think it would be very appropriate if he were wiped out in the same system.|[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|}} '''Selcaron''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Selaggis VI]] located in the [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. ==Description== {{Quote|They're descending toward the west coast of the primary continent. I think that's where the colony used to be. Atmospheric conditions not helpful. Heavy rain, heavy winds.|[[Kell Tainer]], to Wedge Antilles|}} Selcaron was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] located within the [[Selaggis system/Legends|Selaggis system]] of the [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]], a part of the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It lay on the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant Run]], which connected it to the [[Bandomeer system/Legends|Bandomeer]] and [[Vahaba system/Legends|Vahaba systems]]. Selcaron was one of the moons of [[Selaggis VI]], a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Selaggis]]. Its surface featured [[Color/Legends|gray]] [[Ocean/Legends|seas]] and brown soil. The moon had a favorable climate that attracted [[Colonist/Legends|colonists]].[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] ==History== {{Quote|Most of the Rogues and Wraiths received a communication from an unknown craft as we were departing Selcaron.|Wedge Antilles|}} In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], Selcaron was the location of a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Unidentified colony (Selcaron)|colony]] that was [[Attack on Selcaron|attacked]] by [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]], who used his [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]], the [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']], to obliterate the colony. {{Moon-stub}} ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|You saw what the ''Iron Fist'' did on Selaggis. It turned the whole colony into rubble.|Han Solo|''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''}} Selcaron was introduced in the [[1994]] novel ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'', written by [[Dave Wolverton]], which mentioned Selaggis as the location of a colony that was obliterated by Warlord Zsinj's Super Star Destroyer ''Iron Fist''. Selaggis then appeared in the [[1998]] PC [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']], which described it as a planet with a "favorable climate that has attracted colonists." The [[1999]] novel ''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'', written by [[Aaron Allston]], later identified the planet as the gas giant Selaggis Six, and [[Retroactive continuity|changed]] the location of the colony to one of its moons, Selcaron. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{1st}} {{ID|Selaggis}} *''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Ret}} {{1stID|Selcaron|in book}} *''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' {{Ab|The Courtship of Princess Leia (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} {{ID|Selaggis}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Rebellion: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Rebellion'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] {{ID|Selaggis}} *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{ID|Selaggis}} *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' {{ID|Selaggis}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' {{ID|Selacron}} *{{CSWECite|III||Selaggis}} {{ID|Selaggis}} *{{SW|url=news/the-imperial-warlords-despoilers-of-an-empire-part-1|series=The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} {{ID|Selacron}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Selcaron }} [[Category:Moons in the New Territories]] [[Category:Moons in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:New Republic moons]] [[Category:Oceanic moons]] [[Category:Rocky moons]] [[Category:Selaggis system locations]] [[Category:Zsinj's Empire moons]]
